expected: Valid cookie-authenticated mutation is 403 without CSRF and succeeds with matching token.
actual: Valid admin mutation was 403 without CSRF and 201 with matching double-submit token.

evidence.actual: Valid admin mutation was 403 without CSRF and 201 with matching double-submit token.

expected: Active fixed product rejects wrong duration, unsupported FX, missing product, and oversized payload without 5xx.

evidence.actual: Per-item codes were INVALID_DURATION, PRICE_UNAVAILABLE, PRODUCT_UNAVAILABLE; 51 items returned 400.

expected: Historical snapshot after price publication returns STALE_PRICE and current list remains updated.

expected: Existing two-item draft has product-scoped discount only on eligible item and reconciled cents.

expected: Purchase-time strict-rules snapshot continues to block reveal with stable 400.
